contradictions.claim_text: Pearson, Cambridge and Pipplet are generic, English-focused competitors.
contradictions.why_it_fails: Pearson and Cambridge are English-centered, but Pipplet and Allingua are plainly multilingual and not English-only. The blanket market framing does not survive a basic contradiction search.
contradictions.resolution: Rewrite the competitor landscape as mixed: some English-focused providers plus some multilingual and Luxembourg-linked providers.

contradictions.claim_text: Nobody does a Luxembourg-specific trilingual language audit.
contradictions.why_it_fails: The claim is absolute and does not hold. Allingua is Luxembourg-based and offers multi-language testing/reporting; Pipplet offers Luxembourgish organizational testing with CEFR-aligned reports. No exact clone of the proposed package was found, but that is not the same as 'nobody'.
contradictions.resolution: Drop the absolute uniqueness claim. At most say the exact package was not located in this search.

notes: The numeric employer-test statistic was not promoted to contradiction status because no primary source confirmed it.
